title: SimpleMsgs
description: SimpleMsgs Is similar to donutsmps msgs with actionbar support and spy support
body:
**SimpleMsgs Plugin Description**
SimpleMsgs is a Minecraft plugin that allows players to send private messages to each other with ease. It also includes features for admins to spy on messages and reload the configuration.

**Features:**

/msg <player> <message>: Send a private message to another player.
/msgtoggle: Toggle the ability to receive private messages.
/smsgs spy: Enable or disable spy mode for admins to monitor messages.
/smsgs reload: Reload the plugin configuration.
**Commands:**

/msg:
Usage: /msg <player> <message>
Aliases: /w, /whisper, /pmsg, /privatemsg, /privatemessage, /tell
Description: Sends a private message to a player.
/msgtoggle:
Usage: /msgtoggle
Description: Toggles receiving private messages.
/smsgs:
Usage: /smsgs <spy|reload>
Description: Admin commands for SimpleMsgs.
Permission: simplemsgs.admin
**Configuration Options:**

prefix: Customize the prefix for messages.
message-format: Customize the format for private messages.
use-action-bar: Option to use the action bar for displaying messages.
messages: Customize various plugin messages.
Example Configuration:


prefix: "&a[MsgPlugin]&r "
message-format: "&bYOU-> %player%:&f %msg%"
use-action-bar: true
messages:
  player-not-found: "&cPlayer not found."
  player-messages-disabled: "&cThis player has private messages disabled."
  private-messages-disabled: "&ePrivate messages disabled."
  private-messages-enabled: "&aPrivate messages enabled."
  usage: "&eUsage: /msg <player> <message>"
  spy-enabled: "&aSpy mode enabled."
  spy-disabled: "&cSpy mode disabled."
  config-reloaded: "&aConfiguration reloaded."
spy-message-format: "&a%player1% -> %player2%&f: %msg%"


**Installation:**

Place the SimpleMsgs plugin jar file in the plugins directory.
Start the server to generate the default configuration file.
Modify the configuration file as needed.
Reload or restart the server to apply changes.
